title: Stellenbosch, Western Cape — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Stellenbosch, Western Cape: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Stellenbosch is a city in Western Cape with a population of 155,000. A historic university town surrounded by world-famous wine estates, with Cape Dutch architecture and mountain views.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
